# dxai

> AI dev environment manager for macOS

dxai is a macOS menu bar app and CLI that provides a unified dashboard for AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex CLI). It tracks token usage, monitors quotas, and offers system optimization — all locally without API keys.

## Repository

- URL: https://github.com/glen15/dxai
- License: MIT
- Platform: macOS 13+

## Components

### Menu Bar App (DxaiBar)

SwiftUI macOS menu bar app (`MenuBarExtra` with `.window` style). Bundle ID: `com.dxai.DxaiBar`.

Features:
- Real-time token usage tracking across Claude Code, Codex CLI
- Quota bars for Claude/Codex 5-hour session and 7-day limits
- Pioneer Rank system: 8 tiers (Bronze → Challenger), 36 levels based on daily token usage
- Kill Streak milestone notifications
- Quick Actions: system status, AI env scan, disk cleanup, optimization
- AI Environment Scan: global/project MCP servers, skills, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md detection
- EN/KR bilingual localization
- Auto-start at login

Source: `app/DxaiBar/Sources/`
Build: `cd app/DxaiBar && ./scripts/build-app.sh release`

### CLI

Bash entrypoint (`dxai`) dispatching to Python/Shell/Go implementations.

Commands:
- `dxai ai` — Token usage dashboard (Claude + Codex)
- `dxai ai watch` — Real-time token monitoring
- `dxai scan` — AI agent environment diagnosis
- `dxai scan --json` — Structured JSON output (used by menu bar app)
- `dxai status` — System health (CPU, memory, disk, network)
- `dxai clean` — Cache, log, temp file cleanup
- `dxai optimize` — Memory, DNS, system DB rebuild
- `dxai analyze` — Disk usage visual explorer
- `dxai purge` — Build artifact cleanup (node_modules, .build, etc.)
- `dxai uninstall` — Full app removal

## Install

```bash
# Menu Bar App (recommended)
brew tap glen15/dxai
brew install --cask dxaibar

# CLI only
brew install dxai

# From source
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/glen15/dxai/main/install.sh | bash
```

Requirements: macOS 13 (Ventura)+, Python 3

## Architecture

```
dxai/
├── dxai                     # CLI entrypoint (Bash)
├── bin/                     # Command implementations (Python/Shell)
│   ├── ai.py                # Token dashboard
│   ├── scan.py              # AI environment scanner
│   ├── clean.sh             # Disk cleanup
│   └── optimize.sh          # System optimization
├── lib/                     # Shared libraries
├── cmd/                     # Go binaries (analyze, status)
├── app/DxaiBar/             # macOS menu bar app (SwiftUI)
│   ├── Sources/             # Swift source files
│   └── scripts/build-app.sh # App bundle builder
├── homebrew/
│   ├── Formula/dxai.rb      # Homebrew formula (CLI)
│   └── Casks/dxaibar.rb     # Homebrew cask (GUI app)
└── .github/workflows/
    └── release.yml           # CI/CD pipeline
```

## Data Handling

- Reads AI tool logs from `~/.claude/`, `~/.codex/` (read-only)
- Never deletes AI tool data
- All processing is local — no data leaves the machine
- Log files (.jsonl) are parsed but never modified

## Token Sources

- Claude Code: `~/.claude/projects/*/logs/*.jsonl`
- Codex CLI: `~/.codex/logs/*.jsonl`

## Pioneer Rank Tiers

| Tier | Entry Threshold | Divisions |
|------|----------------|-----------|
| Bronze | 10K tokens | 5 → 1 |
| Silver | 500K | 5 → 1 |
| Gold | 8M | 5 → 1 |
| Platinum | 50M | 5 → 1 |
| Diamond | 220M | 5 → 1 |
| Master | 620M | 5 → 1 |
| Grandmaster | 1.5B | 5 → 1 |
| Challenger | 5B | Final |

## Key Files

- `app/DxaiBar/Sources/DxaiViewModel.swift` — Core logic, token parsing, rank calculation
- `app/DxaiBar/Sources/DxaiMenuView.swift` — Main UI view
- `app/DxaiBar/Sources/Localization.swift` — EN/KR localization strings
- `app/DxaiBar/Sources/DxaiDatabase.swift` — SQLite persistence
- `app/DxaiBar/Sources/ScanPanelView.swift` — AI environment scan UI
- `bin/ai.py` — CLI token dashboard
- `bin/scan.py` — CLI environment scanner

## Contributing

```bash
# Build and run menu bar app
cd app/DxaiBar
./scripts/build-app.sh release
open build/DxaiBar.app

# Run CLI
./dxai ai
./dxai scan
```
